Variables.Name: PinToolTip
Variables.Description: The tool-tip describing this pin's purpose

Variables.Name: Direction
Variables.Description: Direction of flow of this pin (input or output)

Variables.Name: PinType
Variables.Description: The type of information carried on this pin

Variables.Name: DefaultValue
Variables.Description: Default value for this pin (used if the pin has no connections), stored as a string

Variables.Name: AutogeneratedDefaultValue
Variables.Description: Initial default value (the autogenerated value, to identify if the user has modified the value), stored as a string

Variables.Name: DefaultObject
Variables.Description: If the default value for this pin should be an object, we store a pointer to it

Variables.Name: DefaultTextValue
Variables.Description: If the default value for this pin should be an FText, it is stored here.

Variables.Name: LinkedTo
Variables.Description: Set of pins that we are linked to

Variables.Name: SubPins
Variables.Description: The pins created when a pin is split and hidden

Variables.Name: ParentPin
Variables.Description: The pin that was split and generated this pin

Variables.Name: ReferencePassThroughConnection
Variables.Description: Pin that this pin uses for passing through reference connection
